name: Akatsuki Eazima Co., Ltd.
summary: Akatsuki Eazima Co., Ltd. engages in the energy conservation and renewal businesses in Japan. It is also involved in the air conditioning renovation works, energy management construction, energy-saving lighting fixture renovation, and solar control film construction. In addition, the company engages in the construction, maintenance, and renewal of mechanical, electrical, and architecture related equipment; nuclear power related facility construction; survey, design, construction, and renewal of constructions; water and sewer construction works; civil engineering construction works; landscape construction activities; and golf course sprinkling equipment construction. In addition, it is involved in maintenance/management of building facilities, equipment, and electricity; maintenance of residential building facilities; and conduit repair works. Akatsuki Eazima Co., Ltd. was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Mito, Japan.
